/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sql_base_tools.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsql_base_tools.so -o libsql_base_tools.so CMakeFiles/sql_base_tools.dir/sql_base_tools_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sql_base_tools.dir/sql_base_tools.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
